questions.question: What did Portuguese explorers christen O Rio Mar, "The River Sea," in the 16th century?
What famed film star cruised the U.S. Pacific coast on his converted minesweeper, "The Wild Goose"?
Whose Royal Sceptre is topped by a diamond the size of a hen's egg?
What maternity nurse coined the term "birth control," in 1914?
What Olympic security man was heckled by an Atlanta Braves fan: "Hey, are you going to blow up the stadium"?
What do astronauts call the KC-135 that NASA uses to simulate weightlessness?
